text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem tiflow-erezept-operation-outcome-details-cs

This case-sensitive code system https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/CodeSystem/tiflow-erezept-operation-outcome-details-cs defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinitionDeutsch (Deutschland) (German (Germany), de)
TIFLOW_EREZEPT_PZN_INVALID PZN invalidThe provided PZN is invalid or not permitted in the current processing contextPZN ungültig
TIFLOW_EREZEPT_DRUG_CATEGORY_FORBIDDEN Drug category forbiddenThe prescription contains a forbidden medication category, for example BTMArzneimittelkategorie nicht zulässig
TIFLOW_EREZEPT_MVO_FLOWTYPE_INVALID MVO flow type invalidA multiple prescription is not allowed for the addressed flow typeMVO-Flowtyp ungültig
TIFLOW_EREZEPT_MVO_INVALID MVO invalidThe multiple prescription metadata is inconsistent or violates MVO constraintsMehrfachverordnung ungültig
TIFLOW_EREZEPT_MVO_STARTDATE_INVALID MVO start date invalidThe start date of the multiple prescription redemption period is missing or invalidMVO-Startdatum ungültig
TIFLOW_EREZEPT_MVO_ENDDATE_INVALID MVO end date invalidThe end date of the multiple prescription redemption period is invalidMVO-Enddatum ungültig
TIFLOW_EREZEPT_MVO_ID_INVALID MVO id invalidThe multiple prescription id does not match the required identifier schemaMVO-ID ungültig
TIFLOW_EREZEPT_MVO_NOT_VALID MVO not valid yetThe multiple prescription part is not redeemable yet because its redemption period has not startedTeilverordnung noch nicht einlösbar

name: TIFLOWEREZEPTOperationOutcomeDetailsCS
title: TIFLOW EREZEPT Operation Outcome Details CS
description: E-Rezept-spezifische Codes, die im Rahmen des TIFlow in den OperationOutcomes.details angegeben werden können

concept.definition: The provided PZN is invalid or not permitted in the current processing context
The prescription contains a forbidden medication category, for example BTM
A multiple prescription is not allowed for the addressed flow type
The multiple prescription metadata is inconsistent or violates MVO constraints
The start date of the multiple prescription redemption period is missing or invalid
The end date of the multiple prescription redemption period is invalid
The multiple prescription id does not match the required identifier schema
The multiple prescription part is not redeemable yet because its redemption period has not started
